MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON DEC-19-2019 IN 206, PLAINTIFFS' MOTION FOR TRIAL SETTING PREFERENCE. SIL LIAPIS, ESQ. APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFFS. MARYAN DRESNER, ESQ. APPEARING FOR DEFENDANTS ARNOLD GARY BALMES AND CHANTILLY BALMES. THE COURT DID NOT CONSIDER DEFENDANT'S OPPOSITION PAPERS SINCE THERE WERE NO COURTESY COPIES PROVIDED TO THE COURT WHICH IS IN VIOLATION OF SF LOCAL RULE 2.7(B) AND WAS NOT ALLOWED TO ARGUE. AFTER HAVING CONSIDERED THE PAPERS AND HEARING FROM PLAINTIFF, THE COURT DENIES PLAINTIFFS' MOTION FOR TRIAL SETTING PREFERENCE WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFFS WERE ABLE TO QUALIFY FOR PREFERENCE UNDER CCP 36(A)(1), BUT NOT WITH CCP 36(A)(2). JUDGE: GARRETT L. WONG; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
